sentence: go to saucedemo.com, log in with username standard_user and password secret_sauce, add the Sauce Labs Backpack and the Sauce Labs Bike Light to the cart, open the shopping cart, click checkout, enter first name Test, last name User, postal code 12345, continue, and then finish the order

workflow.name: On Browser Home Page
workflow.description: Start the process from a fresh browser tab.
triggers: If the current URL is chrome://new-tab-page/
If the current URL is about:blank
If the current URL starts with data:
If no page has been loaded yet
actions: Navigate to https://www.saucedemo.com/

workflow.name: On Login Page
workflow.description: Enter login credentials and submit the form.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com
If an input field with placeholder 'Username' is visible
actions: Type 'standard_user' into the input field with placeholder 'Username'
Type 'secret_sauce' into the input field with placeholder 'Password'
Click the button with text 'Login'

workflow.name: On Products Page
workflow.description: Add specified items to the cart and then proceed to the cart.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/inventory.html
If a div with text 'Products' is visible
actions: Click the button with text 'Add to cart' for the item 'Sauce Labs Backpack'
Click the button with text 'Add to cart' for the item 'Sauce Labs Bike Light'
Click the shopping cart icon

workflow.name: On Cart Page
workflow.description: Proceed from the cart to the checkout process.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/cart.html
If a div with text 'Your Cart' is visible
actions: Click the button with text 'Checkout'

workflow.name: On Checkout Step One Page
workflow.description: Enter shipping information and continue to the next step.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/checkout-step-one.html
If an input field with placeholder 'First Name' is visible
actions: Type 'Test' into the input field with placeholder 'First Name'
Type 'User' into the input field with placeholder 'Last Name'
Type '12345' into the input field with placeholder 'Zip/Postal Code'
Click the button with text 'Continue'

workflow.name: On Checkout Step Two Page
workflow.description: Confirm the order details and finish the purchase.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/checkout-step-two.html
If a div with text 'Checkout: Overview' is visible
actions: Click the button with text 'Finish'

workflow.name: On Checkout Complete Page
workflow.description: Verify that the order has been successfully placed.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/checkout-complete.html
If a div with text 'Checkout: Complete!' is visible
actions: Terminate: Order successfully placed

sentence: go to saucedemo.com, log in with username standard_user and password secret_sauce, sort the products by price from low to high, add the two cheapest products to the cart, open the cart, remove one of them, and confirm exactly one item remains

workflow.name: On Browser Home Page
workflow.description: Start the process from a fresh browser tab.
triggers: If the current URL is chrome://new-tab-page/
If the current URL is about:blank
If the current URL starts with data:
If no page has been loaded yet
actions: Navigate to https://www.saucedemo.com/

workflow.name: On Login Page
workflow.description: Log in with the provided credentials.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com
If an input field with placeholder 'Username' is visible
actions: Type 'standard_user' into the input field with placeholder 'Username'
Type 'secret_sauce' into the input field with placeholder 'Password'
Click the button with text 'Login'

workflow.name: On Products Page - Sort
workflow.description: Sort the products by price from low to high.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/inventory.html
If an element with text 'Products' is visible
actions: Click the dropdown with class 'product_sort_container'
Select option 'Price (low to high)' from the dropdown with class 'product_sort_container'

workflow.name: On Products Page - Add to Cart
workflow.description: Add the two cheapest products to the cart after sorting.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/inventory.html
If the dropdown with class 'product_sort_container' has 'Price (low to high)' selected
actions: Click the 'Add to cart' button for the first product in the list
Click the 'Add to cart' button for the second product in the list

workflow.name: On Products Page - Open Cart
workflow.description: Open the shopping cart.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/inventory.html
If the shopping cart icon shows '2' items
actions: Click the shopping cart icon

workflow.name: On Cart Page - Remove Item
workflow.description: Remove one of the items from the cart.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/cart.html
If an element with text 'Your Cart' is visible
actions: Click the 'Remove' button for the first item in the cart

workflow.name: On Cart Page - Confirm One Item
workflow.description: Confirm that exactly one item remains in the cart.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/cart.html
If the number of items in the cart is 1
actions: Terminate: Exactly one item remains in the cart.

sentence: go to the-internet.herokuapp.com/login, log in with username tomsmith and password SuperSecretPassword!, click Logout, then go to the-internet.herokuapp.com/dynamic_controls, click the Enable button, wait for the input field to become enabled, and type hello into it

workflow.name: Start and Navigate to Login
workflow.description: Starts from a fresh tab and navigates to the login page on the-internet.herokuapp.com.
triggers: If the current URL is chrome://new-tab-page/
If the current URL is about:blank
If the current URL starts with data:
If no page has been loaded yet
actions: Navigate to https://the-internet.herokuapp.com/login

workflow.name: On Login Page
workflow.description: Identifies the login page and attempts to log in with the provided credentials.
triggers: If the current URL contains the-internet.herokuapp.com/login
If a text input with name 'username' is visible
actions: Type 'tomsmith' into the text input with name 'username'
Type 'SuperSecretPassword!' into the password input with name 'password'
Click the button with text 'Login'

workflow.name: On Secure Area After Login
workflow.description: Confirms successful login to the secure area and clicks the 'Logout' button.
triggers: If the current URL contains the-internet.herokuapp.com/secure
If a button with text 'Logout' is visible
actions: Click the button with text 'Logout'

workflow.name: After Logout, Navigate to Dynamic Controls
workflow.description: After logging out, navigates to the dynamic controls page.
triggers: If the current URL contains the-internet.herokuapp.com/login
If a div with class 'flash success' and text 'You logged out of the secure area!' is visible
actions: Navigate to https://the-internet.herokuapp.com/dynamic_controls

workflow.name: On Dynamic Controls Page, Click Enable
workflow.description: Identifies the dynamic controls page and clicks the 'Enable' button.
triggers: If the current URL contains the-internet.herokuapp.com/dynamic_controls
If a button with text 'Enable' is visible
actions: Click the button with text 'Enable'

workflow.name: Waiting for Input Field to Enable
workflow.description: Waits for the input field to become enabled after the 'Enable' button was clicked.
triggers: If the current URL contains the-internet.herokuapp.com/dynamic_controls
If a button with text 'Disable' is visible
If the text input with id 'text' is disabled

workflow.name: Input Field Enabled, Type 'hello'
workflow.description: Detects that the input field is now enabled and types 'hello' into it.
triggers: If the current URL contains the-internet.herokuapp.com/dynamic_controls
If the text input with id 'text' is enabled
actions: Type 'hello' into the text input with id 'text'

workflow.name: Task Complete
workflow.description: Confirms 'hello' has been typed into the enabled input field and terminates the workflow.
triggers: If the current URL contains the-internet.herokuapp.com/dynamic_controls
If the text input with id 'text' has value 'hello'
actions: Terminate: Successfully typed 'hello' into the enabled field.

issues.state: Waiting for Input Field to Enable
issues.message: Empty actions with a wait/verification-sounding name -- looks like an intentional 'sit here until something external changes' state. Confirm that's what you meant.

sentence: go to automationexercise.com, search for 'dress', add the first two products in the results to your cart, view the cart, and confirm both products are listed

workflow.name: On Browser Home Page
workflow.description: Start the process from a fresh browser tab and navigate to automationexercise.com.
triggers: If the current URL is chrome://new-tab-page/
If the current URL is about:blank
If the current URL starts with data:
If no page has been loaded yet
actions: Navigate to https://automationexercise.com/

workflow.name: On Automation Exercise Homepage
workflow.description: Locate the search input and search for 'dress'.
triggers: If the current URL contains automationexercise.com
If an input field with placeholder 'Search Product' is visible
actions: Type 'dress' into the input field with placeholder 'Search Product'
Click the button with text 'Search'

workflow.name: On Search Results Page
workflow.description: Add the first two 'dress' products to the cart and then proceed to view the cart.
triggers: If the current URL contains /search_products
If the heading 'SEARCHED PRODUCTS' is visible
actions: Hover over the first product item in the results list
Click the 'Add to cart' button that appears on hover for the first product
Click the 'Continue Shopping' button in the popup modal
Hover over the second product item in the results list
Click the 'Add to cart' button that appears on hover for the second product
Click the 'View Cart' button in the popup modal

workflow.name: On Cart Page
workflow.description: Verify that both 'dress' products are listed in the shopping cart.
triggers: If the current URL contains /view_cart
If the heading 'Shopping Cart' is visible
If at least two product rows are visible in the cart table
actions: Check if the text 'Dress' appears at least twice in the product names within the cart table
Terminate: Both 'dress' products confirmed in cart

sentence: go to saucedemo.com, log in with username standard_user and password secret_sauce, open the Sauce Labs Fleece Jacket product page, add it to the cart from that page, go back to the products list, open the shopping cart, click checkout, and fill in first name Test, last name User, postal code 12345

workflow.name: On Browser Home Page
workflow.description: Start the process from a fresh browser tab.
triggers: If the current URL is chrome://new-tab-page/
If the current URL is about:blank
If the current URL starts with data:
If no page has been loaded yet
actions: Navigate to https://www.saucedemo.com/

workflow.name: On Login Page
workflow.description: Log in to the application with the provided credentials.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com
If an input field with placeholder 'Username' is visible
actions: Type 'standard_user' into the input field with placeholder 'Username'
Type 'secret_sauce' into the input field with placeholder 'Password'
Click the button with text 'Login'

workflow.name: On Products Page
workflow.description: Locate and open the 'Sauce Labs Fleece Jacket' product page.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/inventory.html
If a div with text 'Products' is visible
actions: Click the link with text 'Sauce Labs Fleece Jacket'

workflow.name: On Fleece Jacket Product Page
workflow.description: Add the 'Sauce Labs Fleece Jacket' to the cart.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/inventory-item.html?id=5
If a button with text 'Add to cart' is visible
actions: Click the button with text 'Add to cart'

workflow.name: On Fleece Jacket Product Page (After Add to Cart)
workflow.description: Go back to the products list after adding the item to the cart.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/inventory-item.html?id=5
If a button with text 'Remove' is visible
actions: Click the button with text 'Back to products'

workflow.name: On Products Page (After Returning)
workflow.description: Open the shopping cart from the products list.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/inventory.html
If a div with text 'Products' is visible
actions: Click the link with class 'shopping_cart_link'

workflow.name: On Shopping Cart Page
workflow.description: Proceed to checkout from the shopping cart.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/cart.html
If a div with text 'Your Cart' is visible
actions: Click the button with text 'Checkout'

workflow.name: On Checkout Your Information Page
workflow.description: Fill in the customer's first name, last name, and postal code.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/checkout-step-one.html
If an input field with placeholder 'First Name' is visible
actions: Type 'Test' into the input field with placeholder 'First Name'
Type 'User' into the input field with placeholder 'Last Name'
Type '12345' into the input field with placeholder 'Zip/Postal Code'
Click the button with text 'Continue'

workflow.name: On Checkout Overview Page
workflow.description: Confirm that the checkout information has been successfully entered.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/checkout-step-two.html
If a div with text 'Checkout: Overview' is visible
actions: Terminate: Checkout information filled.
